title: Reasoning Studies
description: Three independent images testing structured visual reasoning without reference dependencies.
creative_direction: Independent studies for the Thinking Mode theme: each image converts a different reasoning workflow into a clear editorial or product-like visual system.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
